text: I enter a space that immediately feels curated, intentional, and almost clinical—glass, signs, order. As I cross the threshold into the R+D room, the environment shifts into an abstract and intellectual territory. My mind is stirred: the blur, the text, the displays—everything seems awash in purpose, but also in ambiguity. There is a sense of progression, of being on the threshold of understanding, yet always just a step away from certainty. I feel curious, slightly unsettled, and drawn into reflection.
